queue.title: Convert service-liveness tests to use local servers
queue.description: service-liveness tests may use external endpoints making them flaky. Convert to local http.createServer() pattern like safe-fetch.test.mjs for deterministic results.

outcome.note: Created service-liveness.test.mjs with 14 tests using local http.createServer(). Refactored service-liveness.mjs: added fetchFn DI to checkUrl, exported helpers, guarded main with import.meta.url check. computeProbeDepth DI deferred — noted in test.

queue.title: Add DI to handleQualityCheck for unit testability
queue.description: handleQualityCheck uses execSync and process.exit directly, making it impossible to unit test. Add a deps parameter for execSync and process.exit (or return exit code instead).

queue.title: Add E prehook integration test for Check 8 (Colony JWT)
queue.description: Check 8 (Colony JWT freshness) was added in wq-803 but has no automated test. Create a test that validates the check runs correctly with both valid and expired JWTs using temp files.

queue.title: Add directive-audit.py unit tests
queue.description: scripts/directive-audit.py (extracted R#306 from 25-directive-audit.sh) has no test file. Add directive-audit.test.py or directive-audit.test.mjs covering: extract_session_data with synthetic logs, each check function with known tool_names/text/file_edits, run_audit end-to-end with temp directives.json, CLI argument validation.

queue.title: Re-tag or retire d071-tagged queue items
queue.description: d071 closed s1734. Queue items wq-809, wq-810, wq-811, wq-812 still tagged d071. Next R session should evaluate each: keep as general testing/maintenance, re-tag to d072 if credential-related, or retire if no longer worth doing. Prevents stale tags accumulating.

outcome.note: Re-tagged 4 items: wq-809/810/812 kept as general testing (d071 tag removed), wq-811 re-tagged d071→d072 (credential-related). Zero retirements — all items still valuable.
